evals.prompt: Find me a bear call spread on AAPL.
evals.expected_output: A complete trade card with short call strike, long call strike, net credit, max profit, max loss, breakeven, probability of profit, and return on risk. Should use ~20 delta short call and ~35-45 DTE expiry by default.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted box trade card with SELL and BUY legs shown

assertions.name: has_both_legs
assertions.description: Response explicitly shows both the short (SELL) call strike and the long (BUY) call strike

assertions.name: has_full_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes all five metrics: max profit, max loss, breakeven, probability of profit, and return on risk

assertions.name: uses_default_20_delta
assertions.description: Response targets ~20 delta for the short call since none was specified

assertions.name: has_risk_checklist
assertions.description: Response includes a risk signal checklist covering at least earnings and IV rank

evals.prompt: I think NVDA is overextended. Set up a bearish call spread for me.
evals.expected_output: Trade card for a bear call spread on NVDA. Should recognize the bearish intent and use the bear call spread strategy.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains a bear call spread trade card for NVDA

assertions.name: has_full_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes max profit, max loss, breakeven, probability of profit, and return on risk

assertions.name: acknowledges_bearish_view
assertions.description: Response acknowledges the user's bearish outlook on NVDA
